title: Best of Kenya Mara Safari
description: Experience the iconic Maasai Mara wildlife with luxury game drives and optional balloon safari. This safari is ideal for witnessing Kenya’s Big Five and the Great Migration (Jul–Oct) in a short, immersive trip.
highlights: Full day guided game drives in Maasai Mara
Exclusive safari Landcruiser use, not shared

itinerary.title: Naivasha to Maasai Mara
itinerary.description: Pick up at 07:30 hrs from Enashipai Resort in Naivasha. 5-hour drive to Maasai Mara, lunch at Olorien Camp, followed by afternoon game drive at 15:30 hrs. Overnight at Zebra Plains Mara Camp.

itinerary.title: Full Day in Maasai Mara
itinerary.description: Morning and afternoon game drives. Optional hot air balloon safari. Spot the Big Five and other wildlife. Overnight at Zebra Plains Mara Camp.

itinerary.title: Departure to Nairobi
itinerary.description: Early morning game drive at 06:00 hrs before breakfast. Depart 08:30 hrs for Nairobi, arriving 14:30 hrs. Drop off at JKIA for onward flight at 16:45 hrs.

included: Accommodation on Full Board at Olorien Camp
Exclusive use of safari-equipped Landcruiser (not shared)
Professional driver guide and pre-tour briefing
All park entrance fees and relevant taxes
notIncluded: Personal expenses (travel insurance, laundry, phone calls, meals/drinks not indicated)
accommodation: Zebra Plains Mara Camp – Maasai Mara (2 nights)

travelInfo.clothes: Bring mosquito repellent, sunscreen, hat, sunglasses, and malaria medication. Early mornings and evenings can be cool; a sweater and trousers/jeans are recommended.
travelInfo.food: Buffet-style meals at lodges, some set menus. All food is of international standard prepared by professional chefs.

note: Berleen Safaris LTD reserves the right to substitute accommodations with similar facilities in circumstances beyond our control.
